# Notiky — LLM-Readable Product Summary

> Factual overview for AI coding agents.

## What Notiky is

Notiky is the product engineering brain — a persistent decision/hypothesis/insight graph for teams building software with AI agents.

Core primitive: typed entities with supersession, contradiction detection, and domain routing. Derivatives include ship plans, tasks, and coding-infrastructure artifacts (`CLAUDE.md`, `.cursor/rules`, `AGENTS.md`, `SKILL.md`).

Notiky is NOT an issue tracker (Linear/Jira handle execution; Notiky mirrors with context). Notiky is NOT a code editor (Cursor/Claude Code write code; Notiky feeds them product context).

## Problem it solves

Product context scatters across Slack, Notion, Linear, and agent sessions. `CLAUDE.md` goes stale. Each new coding session starts without prior decisions attached.

Notiky stores decisions in Postgres (pgvector) and serves them via static artifacts and MCP.

## Product loop

Capture → Analyze → Decide → Update → Deliver

1. **Capture** — meetings, repos, conversations as structured signals
2. **Analyze** — inputs checked against existing decisions and constraints
3. **Decide** — versioned decisions with rationale and evidence
4. **Update** — artifacts and specs regenerated from current graph state
5. **Deliver** — context to Cursor, Claude Code, Codex via MCP and files

## Key features

- Decision/hypothesis graph with bi-temporal versioning (Postgres + pgvector)
- Artifact generation from current decision state (static-first, MCP-enhanced)
- MCP server for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex
- Session capture from coding agent transcripts
- Integrations: Linear, Jira, Granola, Otter.ai, Google Meet
- Team workspaces with shared decision history

## MCP overview

HTTP+SSE MCP server for:

- Searching decisions and hypotheses
- Reading project artifacts
- Listing contradictions and supersession chains
- Injecting session context at session start
- Capturing new decisions from agent sessions

Configure via `notiky setup` and `notiky mcp tokens create`.

## CLI commands

```bash
brew install notiky/tap/notiky
curl -fsSL https://get.notiky.com | bash
notiky setup
notiky daemon status
notiky mcp serve
notiky mcp tokens create
notiky update
```

Supported agent CLIs on PATH: claude, codex, gemini, openclaw, opencode, hermes, pi.

## Tech stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui
- Backend: Go (Chi, sqlc, gorilla/websocket)
- Database: PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector
- AI: Gemini (primary), Claude/GPT via OpenRouter, Vercel AI SDK
- Desktop: Electron

## Open vs hosted

Open / inspectable:
- notiky-cli (Apache 2.0): CLI, daemon, local MCP
- notiky-brain (coming soon): schema, retrieval library, MCP skeleton, eval harness, protocol schemas

Hosted only (notiky.com):
- Consolidation, artifact regeneration, drift detection, brain judge, orchestrator
- Web app, desktop app, hosted MCP endpoint
- Linear integration, pre-indexed docs corpus

## Public repositories

- https://github.com/notiky/.github — org profile, this file
- https://github.com/notiky/notiky-cli — CLI releases
- https://github.com/notiky/homebrew-tap — Homebrew formula
- https://github.com/notiky/notiky — private (main product)
